keyEvents.text: Ties Kerssies (Sint Maarten) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Guadeloupe 1, Sint Maarten 0. Matthias Phaëton (Guadeloupe) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Tyrell Richardson (Sint Maarten) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Guadeloupe 2, Sint Maarten 0. Ange-Freddy Plumain (Guadeloupe) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the top right corner.
Goal!  Guadeloupe 3, Sint Maarten 0. Luther Archimède (Guadeloupe) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Ange-Freddy Plumain.
Ange-Freddy Plumain (Guadeloupe) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Guadeloupe. Kilian Bevis replaces Luther Archimède because of an injury.
First Half ends, Guadeloupe 3, Sint Maarten 0.
Substitution, Sint Maarten. Imar Kort replaces Sergio Hughes.
Substitution, Sint Maarten. Kael Richards replaces Ilounga Pata.
Goal!  Guadeloupe 4, Sint Maarten 0. Ange-Freddy Plumain (Guadeloupe) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Taïryk Arconte   following a fast break.
Substitution, Sint Maarten. Kay Gerritsen replaces Ties Kerssies.
Substitution, Guadeloupe. Morgan Saint-Maximin replaces Ange-Freddy Plumain.
Substitution, Guadeloupe. Méddy Lina replaces Jérôme Roussillon.
Substitution, Guadeloupe. Steven Davidas replaces Taïryk Arconte.
Substitution, Guadeloupe. Gregory Gendrey replaces Alexandre Arénate.
Substitution, Sint Maarten. Diaro Forsythe replaces Oliver Hobgood.
Matthias Phaëton (Guadeloupe) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Sint Maarten. Elmer de Vries replaces Gerwin Lake.
Morgan Saint-Maximin (Guadeloupe) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half ends, Guadeloupe 4, Sint Maarten 0.
